summary: Resolve late-post-Endor Star Wars Legends phrasing to Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Crucible Context windows.
promptAddendum: Prefer known late-post-Endor anchors/windows. Do not invent BBY/ABY dates or merge Disney sequel continuity. Prefer story-position anchors and windows over raw BBY/ABY dates; never invent timeline anchors outside this deck registry.
